title: Mobile-First Pricing Grid

statement.markdown:
## Mobile-First Pricing Grid

Build a comparison matrix layout adjusting pricing plans between viewports.

### Requirements:
1. **Stacked Mobile Layout**: Single-column vertical stacks on viewports (<640px) placing plans one below another.
2. **Grid Side-by-Side**: Adapts to 3 columns grid on desktop viewports (>960px).
3. **Featured Card**: Display a distinct feature badge overlay on the middle card scaling its proportions slightly.

constraints: Must implement custom margins and paddings using responsive breakpoints
Do not use fixed-width layouts for columns

starterCode.html:
Basic Plan
Featured Plan
Pro Plan
starterCode.css: /* Implement mobile-first vertical stack and desktop row wrap flex layout resets here */

gradingCriteria.description: Verify cards are rendered in a full-width vertical stack on mobile width.
Verify featured plan is styled with highlight borders and correct aspect spacing on desktops.
